ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., show tunes, jazz, rock) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist (e.g., Cats 1981 Original London Cast) */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who performed the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the song belongs to */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song on the album */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the audio features belong to */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0-1) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0-1) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0-1) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0-1) */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song (0-1) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0-1) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in beats per minute */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the song belongs to */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song liked by the user */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user liked the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who disliked the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song disliked by the user */,
  "disliked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user disliked the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislikes_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_counts" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the song */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played by the user */,
  "last_played_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was last played by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_counts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_counts_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the recommendation is for */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song recommended to the user */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who followed the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user followed the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
